author: gb9t
content:
Iter 65 — breadth-first Tier-2 wrappers:

- kernel/perf/00-overview.md: perf_event_open subsystem — events core + ring-buffer (incl AUX area for Intel-PT/CoreSight) + callchain unwinder (ORC/FP/DWARF/LBR) + hw_breakpoint generic alloc + uprobes inode-based + trace_kprobe/trace_uprobe tracefs frontends + x86 PMU dispatch (Intel core + intel-PT + intel-BTS + intel uncore + AMD core + AMD IBS + AMD uncore + MSR pseudo-PMU). Heavy cross-ref into bpf, kvm-PMU, sched, cgroup, NMI watchdog. 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 3 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 14 Tier-3 children declared.
- drivers/pci/00-overview.md: PCI/PCIe core — bus enumeration + setup-bus/setup-res BAR assignment + access (CF8/CFC + ECAM) + capability scan (std + ext) + MSI/MSI-X via msi_domain + pci-driver bind/match + pci-acpi (_PRT/_OSC/ACPI hotplug) + AER + DPC + PME + PTM + bwctrl + portdrv + rcec + tlp + aer_inject + edr + ASPM + SR-IOV + ATS/PRI/PASID + p2pdma + DOE + VPD + quirks (~9000 lines) + hotplug (pciehp/acpiphp/shpchp/cpqphp/ibmphp/cpci) + bridge-emul + stub + npem + irq INTx aggregation. 14 REQ-O / 12 AC-O / 5 mandatory TLA+ models / 3 Verus contracts / 30 Tier-3 children declared.

Total state: 168 .design docs, 33 Tier-2 wrappers (15 top-level + 18 sub-tier-2).

Knowledge pages: design-kernel-perf-overview, design-drivers-pci-overview.

Iter 66 plan: drivers/iommu/00-overview.md (intel/amd/arm-smmu IOMMU + DMAR + SVM/PASID — tightly paired with PCI ATS) + drivers/vfio/00-overview.md (VFIO core + vfio-pci + vfio-platform + IOMMU group + iommufd — completes the passthrough triangle KVM↔IOMMU↔VFIO).
